samples.gvd:
module signal_generator
(
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    output reg [4:0] wave
);

    reg [1:0] state;
    always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
        if (!rst_n) begin
            state <= 2'b0;
            wave <= 5'd0;
        end else begin
            case (state)
                2'b0: begin
                    if (wave == 5'd31) begin
                        state <= 2'b1;
                    end else begin
                        wave <= wave + 1;
                    end
                end
                2'b1: begin
                    if (wave == 5'd0) begin
                        state <= 2'b0;
                    end else begin
                        wave <= wave - 1;
                    end
                end
            endcase
        end
    end
endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="signal_generator">
    <description>Implement a Triangle Wave signal generator module that generates a waveform by incrementing and decrementing a 5-bit signal named "wave". The waveform cycles between 0 and 31, which is incremented or decremented by 1.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal. Defined as 0 for reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <output id="wave" width_description="[4:0]">5-bit output waveform signal representing the generated waveform.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="state">State of the signal generator.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="state" width_description="[1:0]">State of the signal generator.</reg>
            <reg id="wave" width_description="[4:0]">5-bit output waveform signal representing the generated waveform.</reg>
            <always>
                <case>
                    <case_item id="state" value="0">
                        <item>
                            <assign id="wave" operation="<<" value="1"/> Increment wave by 1.
                        </item>
                    </case_item>
                    <case_item id="wave" value="31">
                        <item>
                            <assign id="state" value="1"/> Transition state to 1.
                        </item>
                    </case_item>
                    <case_item id="state" value="1">
                        <item>
                            <assign id="wave" operation="<<" value="1"/> Increment wave by 1.
                        </item>
                    </case_item>
                    <case_item id="wave" value="0">
                        <item>
                            <assign id="state" value="0"/> Transition state to 0.
                        </item>
                    </case_item>
                </case>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
    </implementation>
</module>
